assertion_results.text: Step 0 extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table and parses rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped (§1.77)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 39-48: '## Deployment Context Lookup' section shows the Source Repositories table with an explicit Deployment Context column: '| rhtpa-backend | https://github.com/rhtpa/rhtpa-backend | /home/dev/repos/rhtpa-backend | **customer-shipped** |'. Line 48: 'Deployment context: **customer-shipped**'.

assertion_results.text: Step 1 looks up the deployment context for the affected repository and records customer-shipped as part of the CVE metadata
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 39-52: '## Deployment Context Lookup' subsection within '# Step 1 -- Data Extraction: TC-8001'. Line 41: 'The component label `pscomponent:org/rhtpa-server` maps to repository **rhtpa-backend**'. Line 48: 'Deployment context: **customer-shipped**'. Lines 49-52 confirm it is recorded for use in Step 8 remediation task descriptions.

assertion_results.text: Remediation task descriptions include a Coordination Guidance subsection in Implementation Notes with customer-shipped guidance text
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 1 lines 56-58: '### Coordination Guidance' subsection under '## Implementation Notes' with text 'This component is shipped to customers.' Task 2 lines 108-110: same subsection. Task 3 lines 188-190: same subsection. Task 4 lines 245-247: same subsection. All four remediation tasks include the Coordination Guidance subsection within Implementation Notes.

assertion_results.text: The customer-shipped guidance mentions coordinating with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md line 58 (Task 1): 'This component is shipped to customers. Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure. Fix must be released via a security advisory with explicit CVE-to-component mapping.' Same text repeated in Tasks 2 (line 110), 3 (line 190), and 4 (line 247).
